# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""
Created on Wed Feb 19 02:04:50 2020

@author: vikas
"""

import math
def main():
    n,m,i,j,a,b=map(int,input().split())
    x=min(i+a,n-i+1)
    y=min(j+b,m-j+1)
    x=min(x,n-i+1)
    y=min(y,m-j+1)
    x=min(x,i-1)
    y=min(y,j-1)
    x=min(x,n-i+1)
    y=min(y,m-j+1)
    if(x<=0 or y<=0):
        print("Poor Inna and pony!");
    else:
        print(math.ceil(math.log2(max(x,y))))
main()
